seoTitle: South Yelbeni vs South Yuna — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Yelbeni and South Yuna. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Yelbeni vs South Yuna: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Yelbeni and South Yuna.
heading: South Yelbeni vs South Yuna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Yelbeni, Western Australia and South Yuna, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Yuna has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to South Yelbeni (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Yelbeni or South Yuna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Yelbeni has a flood risk score of 26/100, while South Yuna scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Yelbeni scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. South Yuna scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Yelbeni or South Yuna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Yuna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
